_comment: Files the per-repo bundle owns. TEP-tgvwct Phase 5: skills, agents, and the kanban MCP are now delivered by the tandem-methodology plugin (from the thinkube marketplace) and are NO LONGER copied here — that copy + drift was the propagation problem the plugin removes. This bundle now carries only what a plugin cannot deliver into a repo: the permissions merge, the ownership-guard hook (file + registration), and the CLAUDE.md methodology block. BundleInstaller reads this to know what to install and records hashes in .claude/.bundle-version.json for drift detection of the retained files.
